description: A developer needs to secure a loan to finance the construction of a new condominium project.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a comprehensive loan package, including the project pro-forma, architectural plans, and developer's resume.

expected_outcome.value: A complete and professional loan request package is assembled.

nodes.task_description: Submit the loan package to multiple commercial banks and lenders.

expected_outcome.value: The loan request is sent to at least five potential lenders.

nodes.task_description: Compare loan term sheets from interested lenders and negotiate the final loan terms.

expected_outcome.value: The developer accepts a term sheet and moves toward closing the construction loan.
